GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: This file contains the metadata, events, and data for REDCap project "Rand Trigger .0800".

redcap:Surveys.title: Survey
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

Question.TranslatedText: Do you describe yourself as a man, a woman, or in some other way?

Randomization Group: [ rand-group ]: [rand-group:1] Randomization Number: [ rand-number ]: [rand-number:2] Randomization Time: [ rand-time ]: [rand-time] Randomization UTC Time: [ rand-utc-time ]: [rand-utc-time]
